---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "Tier 6 — Undergraduate Advanced · Years 3–4 · Abstract algebra, complex analysis, ODEs/PDEs, optimisation, information theory, Fourier analysis"
---

## What this tier is for

Tier 5 gave you the undergraduate core. Tier 6 takes you into the
**deep waters** — abstract structures (groups, rings, fields), the
beauty of complex analysis, the calculus of waves and heat flow,
optimisation theory, the geometry of information, and the great
unifier of analysis: Fourier methods.

By the end of Tier 6 you can:

- Reason about **groups, rings, fields** and their properties.
- Work with **complex numbers**, complex functions, and Cauchy's
  integral theorem.
- Solve **second-order ODEs** and analyse **PDEs** (heat, wave,
  Laplace).
- Apply **numerical methods** for root finding and ODE integration.
- Use **convex optimisation** and modern **gradient methods** (SGD,
  Adam).
- Quantify uncertainty with **information theory** (entropy, mutual
  information).
- Decompose periodic signals with **Fourier series** and arbitrary
  signals with the **Fourier transform**.
- Analyse graph properties using **spectral methods**.
- Read the **spectral theorem** and a preview of functional analysis.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Groups] --> B[02 · Rings & Fields]
    A --> C[03 · Group Actions]
    D[04 · Complex Numbers] --> E[05 · Complex Functions]
    F[06 · Second-Order ODEs] --> G[07 · PDEs]
    H[08 · Numerical Methods]
    I[09 · Convex Optimisation] --> J[10 · Gradient Methods]
    K[11 · Information Theory]
    L[12 · Fourier Series] --> M[13 · Fourier Transform]
    N[14 · Spectral Graph Theory]
    O[15 · Spectral Theorem]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Groups — Symmetry and Structure**](01-groups/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Rings and Fields**](02-rings-fields/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · Group Actions and Symmetry**](03-group-actions/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · Complex Numbers and Operations**](04-complex-numbers/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Complex Functions and Cauchy's Theorem**](05-complex-functions/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Second-Order Linear ODEs**](06-second-order-odes/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Partial Differential Equations**](07-pdes/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · Numerical Methods**](08-numerical-methods/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · Convex Optimisation**](09-convex-optimization/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · Gradient Methods and SGD Variants**](10-gradient-methods/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Information Theory**](11-information-theory/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · Fourier Series**](12-fourier-series/index.qmd)
13. [**13 · The Fourier Transform**](13-fourier-transform/index.qmd)
14. [**14 · Spectral Graph Theory**](14-spectral-graph-theory/index.qmd)
15. [**15 · The Spectral Theorem and Functional Analysis Preview**](15-spectral-theorem/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
